title: Myxopappus hereroensis

The exact classification of Myxopappus hereroensis may be subject to change based on ongoing research and taxonomic revisions. As part of the Asteraceae family, Myxopappus hereroensis is also related to other flowering plants commonly known as daisies and sunflowers.
